traditional.name: Traditional Savings Circle
traditional.description: Classic consorcio/ROSCA with no yield. Monthly contributions, round-robin payouts.

dyorx.name: DYORX Circle (Solana DeFi Yield)
dyorx.description: DYORX-powered circle where idle pooled funds earn yield via Kamino/MarginFi on Solana. Yield distributed proportionally to contributions.

circle_compositions.label: Best Case — reliable core + 1 freerider
circle_compositions.description: Mostly reliable savers with one opportunistic freerider. Represents a well-screened group with one bad apple.

circle_compositions.label: Realistic Average — mixed bag
circle_compositions.description: A realistic cross-section of personality types, weighted toward common archetypes.

circle_compositions.label: Tough Circle — stressed + irregular earners
circle_compositions.description: High-risk composition: financially stressed members and gig workers with unpredictable income.

circle_compositions.label: Leader-Dependent — group leader + social followers
circle_compositions.description: Circle cohesion depends heavily on the group leader. Social followers mirror group behavior.

circle_compositions.label: Control — random weighted distribution
circle_compositions.description: Agents drawn randomly from weighted personality pool. Baseline control group.
